notes: Top-level cross-pillar compendium. Each entry lights when its `requires` predicates are met against OneironauticsTokens + GauntletState — data the four pillars already write. Chapters: the_reading (VN), the_gauntlet (arcana), the_county (Community Planned), the_shelf (slowsticks), threads (cross-Oneironautics). Predicate shapes: {token},{token_prefix},{arcana_won},{all_arcana},{canon,eq},{any:[]},{all:[]}. See lore/_ONEIRONAUTS_ALMANAC_DESIGN.md.

entries.title: The Reading Begun
entries.blurb: You opened the fifth book — the twenty-two, one chapter a card. The deck was already dealing itself.

entries.title: 0 · The Fool, read
entries.blurb: D'Ambrosio's diner, on the page. The same room the gauntlet deals you.

entries.title: III · The Empress, read
entries.blurb: Nicola at the riverboat, nineteen going on ancient — the chapter behind the board.

entries.title: XIII · Death, read
entries.blurb: Ward C, the quiet committal. You read it before you ever played it.

entries.title: XVI · The Tower, read
entries.blurb: The transmitter shack, the signal that counts. The card that falls.

entries.title: XXI · The World, read
entries.blurb: Frog Knows Best. The loop the reading closes.

entries.title: The Whole Reading Read
entries.blurb: All twenty-two chapters read, Fool to World — the book beneath the board, entire.

entries.title: The First Card Turned
entries.blurb: You won a reading. One arcana laid to rest.

entries.title: 0 · The Fool
entries.blurb: D'Ambrosio's diner. Where every deck begins.

entries.title: The Whole Deck
entries.blurb: All twenty-two arcana, Fool to World, laid down and lifted. The reading is complete.

entries.title: The Fool's Journey
entries.blurb: You began the Major Arcana in order — the reading as a sequence, not a shelf.

entries.title: Act I · Fool to Chariot
entries.blurb: The first seven laid down. Dean is a name in someone else's ledger.

entries.title: Act II · Strength to Temperance
entries.blurb: The middle passage. Dean is at your table now.

entries.title: Act III · Devil to World
entries.blurb: The descent and the return. The thing that wore Dean sets down the last card.

entries.title: The Journey Complete
entries.blurb: Fool to World, in order, as one run. You walked the whole reading.

entries.title: The County Seat
entries.blurb: You took the planner's chair. Graustark, Harmony Creek, Small Wood — and the tower that dims.

entries.title: Dean's Ledger
entries.blurb: You read the ledger that reads back. Dickens Dean keeps his own books.

entries.title: Fey Faire · The Warren
entries.blurb: You reached the feys beyond the fence. The keyring grew itself.

entries.title: Fey Faire · The Sundering Healed
entries.blurb: You spent Prospero's Word and brought the king and queen back to one court.

entries.title: Earthman Chronicles · The Correction
entries.blurb: You read Rocha's version beside Hubbard's, and chose which one was true.

entries.title: Earthman Chronicles · The Second Reading
entries.blurb: You ran it again with the Corrections applied. It remembered.

entries.title: Basilica of Wires · The Subfloor
entries.blurb: You went one level below M, to the room the map does not print.

entries.title: Patient Mister Glass · The Second Ledger
entries.blurb: You found the book kept under the book.

entries.title: Hane no Niwa · The Ninth Sitting
entries.blurb: You stayed for the ninth. The garden noticed.

entries.title: Riffmaster · The Mourning Bar
entries.blurb: You played the bar nobody plays twice.

entries.title: Sweetgum · The Waterline
entries.blurb: You watched the waterline until it watched back.

entries.title: Sisters Wyrd · The Shimmer
entries.blurb: You crossed where the shimmer thinned the field.

entries.title: Patient Mister Glass · A Silent Evening
entries.blurb: You let one evening pass without a word. It was the loudest.

entries.title: Pirate Summer · The Conversation
entries.blurb: Jenny and Wilson finally had the talk on the dock.

entries.title: The Shelf Begun
entries.blurb: One stick read to its end. Olaf's shelf has a first reader in thirty years.

entries.title: Half the Shelf Read
entries.blurb: Nine sticks laid down. The cabin knows which of them you are now.

entries.title: The Whole Shelf Read
entries.blurb: Every stick Olaf kept, read to its end. What he was collecting was never the games. It was whoever would finally sit down and play them all.

entries.title: THREAD · The 1976 Incident
entries.blurb: Camp Sweetgum's dark decade keeps surfacing — in the shortwave, in the cache, in the island light. The same year is bleeding across the shelf.

entries.title: THREAD · The Rocha Melodies
entries.blurb: One tune, welded into a weekend in '95, keeps humming through games it has no business being in.

entries.title: THREAD · 'for jack'
entries.blurb: A note in blue pen, two words, tucked between two books that do not touch it. Nobody in the Faire wrote it.

entries.title: THREAD · The Whole Reading
entries.blurb: You laid down all twenty-two, and something on the shelf and in the county shifted to match. The walls here were always thin.
